config.name: axonius_asset_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: axonius_asset_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Asset Inventory (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:00:56.532022

-- Pre-declare locals for performance optimization
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format

-- Constants for validation
local REQUIRED_FIELDS = {
    class_uid = true,
    category_uid = true
}

-- Validation helper function
local function validate_record(record)
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return false, "Invalid input record structure"
    end
    return true
end

-- Main transformation function
function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    local is_valid, error_msg = validate_record(record)
    if not is_valid then
        return nil, error_msg
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local reference
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Asset Inventory",
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "Assets",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Axonius Asset Management",
                vendor_name = "Axonius"
            }
        }
    }

    -- Performance-optimized field transformations
    local json_root = record.json_root
    if json_root then
        -- Direct assignment for better performance
        output.asset = json_root
        
        -- Add asset metadata if available
        if type(json_root) == "table" then
            output.asset_id = json_root.id or json_root.asset_id
            output.asset_name = json_root.name or json_root.hostname
        end
    end

    -- Timestamp handling
    local current_time = os_time() * 1000
    output.time = record.time or current_time
    output.metadata.processed_time = current_time

    -- Validation of required fields
    for field in pairs(REQUIRED_FIELDS) do
        if not output[field] then
            return nil, string_format("Missing required field: %s", field)
        end
    end

    -- Error handling for malformed asset data
    if not output.asset then
        output.asset = {}
        output.metadata.parsing_error = "Asset data missing or malformed"
    end

    -- Add observability metadata
    output.metadata.parser_version = "1.0.0"
    output.metadata.source_format = "axonius_asset_logs"

    return output
end

-- Error wrapper for production use
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
